name: onepassword
description: Use the 1Password Pulumi provider to access and manage items in your 1Password vaults.
attribution: This Pulumi package is based on the [`onepassword` Terraform Provider](https://github.com/1Password/terraform-provider-onepassword).

nodejs.packageDescription: Use the 1Password Pulumi provider to access and manage items in your 1Password vaults.
nodejs.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/1Password/terraform-provider-onepassword)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-onepassword` repo](https://github.com/1Password/pulumi-onepassword/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-onepassword` repo](https://github.com/1Password/terraform-provider-onepassword/issues).

python.readme:
> This provider is a derived work of the [Terraform Provider](https://github.com/1Password/terraform-provider-onepassword)
> distributed under [MPL 2.0](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/). If you encounter a bug or missing feature,
> first check the [`pulumi-onepassword` repo](https://github.com/1Password/pulumi-onepassword/issues); however, if that doesn't turn up anything,
> please consult the source [`terraform-provider-onepassword` repo](https://github.com/1Password/terraform-provider-onepassword/issues).

account.description: A valid account name or ID to use desktop app authentication. Can also be sourced from `OP_ACCOUNT` environment variable.

connectToken.description: A valid token for your 1Password Connect server. Can also be sourced from `OP_CONNECT_TOKEN` environment variable. Provider will use 1Password Connect server if set.

connectUrl.description: The HTTP(S) URL where your 1Password Connect server can be found. Can also be sourced `OP_CONNECT_HOST` environment variable. Provider will use 1Password Connect server if set.

serviceAccountToken.description: A valid 1Password service account token. Can also be sourced from `OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN` environment variable.

token.description: A valid token for your 1Password Connect server. Can also be sourced from `OP_CONNECT_TOKEN` environment variable. Provider will use 1Password Connect server if set. Deprecated: Use `connectToken` instead.
token.deprecationMessage: The "token" field is deprecated and will be removed in a future version. Use "connectToken" instead.

url.description: The HTTP(S) URL where your 1Password Connect server can be found. Can also be sourced `OP_CONNECT_HOST` environment variable. Provider will use 1Password Connect server if set. Deprecated: Use `connectUrl` instead.
url.deprecationMessage: The "url" field is deprecated and will be removed in a future version. Use "connectUrl" instead.

digits.description: Use digits [0-9] when generating the password.

length.description: The length of the password to be generated.

symbols.description: Use symbols [!@.-_*] when generating the password.

provider.description:
The provider type for the onepassword package. By default, resources use package-wide configuration
settings, however an explicit `Provider` instance may be created and passed during resource
construction to achieve fine-grained programmatic control over provider settings. See the
[documentation](https://www.pulumi.com/docs/reference/programming-model/#providers) for more information.

category.description: The category of the item. One of ["login" "password" "database" "secureNote"]

database.description: (Only applies to the database category) The name of the database.

hostname.description: (Only applies to the database category) The address where the database can be found

noteValueWo.description:
**NOTE:** This field is write-only and its value will not be updated in state as part of read operations.
A write-only secure note value for this item. This value is not stored in the state and is intended for use with ephemeral values. **Note**: Write-only arguments require Terraform 1.11 or later.

noteValueWoVersion.description: An integer that must be incremented to trigger an update to the 'note_value_wo' field.

passwordRecipe.description: The recipe used to generate a new value for a password.

passwordWo.description:
**NOTE:** This field is write-only and its value will not be updated in state as part of read operations.
A write-only password for this item. This value is not stored in the state and is intended for use with ephemeral values. **Note**: Write-only arguments require Terraform 1.11 or later.

passwordWoVersion.description: An integer that must be incremented to trigger an update to the 'password_wo' field.

port.description: (Only applies to the database category) The port the database is listening on.

sectionMap.description: A map of custom sections in an item, keyed by section label. This allows direct lookup of sections and their fields by label. Cannot be used together with `section`. Use either `section` (list) or `sectionMap` (map), but not both.

sections.description: A list of custom sections in an item. Cannot be used together with `sectionMap`. Use either `section` (list) or `sectionMap` (map), but not both.

tags.description: An array of strings of the tags assigned to the item.

type.description: (Only applies to the database category) The type of database. One of ["db2" "filemaker" "msaccess" "mssql" "mysql" "oracle" "postgresql" "sqlite" "other"]

url.description: The primary URL for the item.

uuid.description: The UUID of the item. Item identifiers are unique within a specific vault.

vault.description: The UUID of the vault the item is in.

inputs.description: A collection of arguments for invoking getEnvironment.

environmentId.description: The unique identifier of the 1Password Environment. You can find this in the 1Password desktop app under Developer > View Environments > Manage environment > Copy environment ID.

metadatas.description: Metadata for each environment variable (name, value, and masked flag). Use this when you need the full structure; use `variables` for a simple name-to-value map.

outputs.description: A collection of values returned by getEnvironment.

environmentId.description: The unique identifier of the 1Password Environment. You can find this in the 1Password desktop app under Developer > View Environments > Manage environment > Copy environment ID.

id.description: The Terraform resource identifier for this environment in the format `environments/<environment_id>`.

metadatas.description: Metadata for each environment variable (name, value, and masked flag). Use this when you need the full structure; use `variables` for a simple name-to-value map.

variables.description: A map of environment variable names to their values. Use this for passing secrets into Terraform resources or for use in `environment` blocks.

inputs.description: A collection of arguments for invoking getItem.

files.description: A list of files attached to the document item.

sectionMap.description: A map of custom sections in an item, keyed by section label. This allows direct lookup of sections and their fields by label. Cannot be used together with `section`. Use either `section` (list) or `sectionMap` (map), but not both.

sections.description: A list of custom sections in an item. Cannot be used together with `sectionMap`. Use either `section` (list) or `sectionMap` (map), but not both.

title.description: The title of the item to retrieve. This field will be populated with the title of the item if the item it looked up by its UUID.

uuid.description: The UUID of the item to retrieve. This field will be populated with the UUID of the item if the item it looked up by its title.

vault.description: The UUID of the vault the item is in.

outputs.description: A collection of values returned by getItem.

category.description: The category of the item. One of ["login" "password" "database" "secure*note" "document" "ssh*key" "apiCredential"]

credential.description: (Only applies to the API credential category) API credential for this item.

database.description: (Only applies to the database category) The name of the database.

filename.description: (Only applies to the API credential category) The filename associated with the API credential.

files.description: A list of files attached to the document item.

hostname.description: (Only applies to the database category) The address where the database can be found

id.description: The Terraform resource identifier for this item in the format `vaults/<vault_id>/items/<item_id>`.

port.description: (Only applies to the database category) The port the database is listening on.

privateKey.description: SSH Private Key in PKCS#8 for this item.

privateKeyOpenssh.description: SSH Private key in OpenSSH format.

publicKey.description: SSH Public Key for this item.

sectionMap.description: A map of custom sections in an item, keyed by section label. This allows direct lookup of sections and their fields by label. Cannot be used together with `section`. Use either `section` (list) or `sectionMap` (map), but not both.

sections.description: A list of custom sections in an item. Cannot be used together with `sectionMap`. Use either `section` (list) or `sectionMap` (map), but not both.

tags.description: An array of strings of the tags assigned to the item.

title.description: The title of the item to retrieve. This field will be populated with the title of the item if the item it looked up by its UUID.

type.description: (Only applies to database and API credential categories) The type of database or API Credential.

url.description: The primary URL for the item.

uuid.description: The UUID of the item to retrieve. This field will be populated with the UUID of the item if the item it looked up by its title.

validFrom.description: (Only applies to the API credential category) The timestamp from which the API credential is valid.

vault.description: The UUID of the vault the item is in.

inputs.description: A collection of arguments for invoking getVault.

name.description: The name of the vault to retrieve. This field will be populated with the name of the vault if the vault it looked up by its UUID.

uuid.description: The UUID of the vault to retrieve. This field will be populated with the UUID of the vault if the vault it looked up by its name.

outputs.description: A collection of values returned by getVault.

id.description: The Terraform resource identifier for this item in the format `vaults/<vault_id>`

name.description: The name of the vault to retrieve. This field will be populated with the name of the vault if the vault it looked up by its UUID.

uuid.description: The UUID of the vault to retrieve. This field will be populated with the UUID of the vault if the vault it looked up by its name.

pulumi:providers:onepassword/terraformCo.description: This function returns a Terraform config object with terraform-namecased keys,to be used with the Terraform Module Provider.
